{{Infobox character
| name = High Gardener
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[High Gardener]] is a role or person mentioned by [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[High Gardener]] is the leader of the [[Consultant assassins]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kerian]] is addressed as [[High Gardener]] by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“You're thinking like the High Gardener,” she said, Not a baby Mason.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Thank you, High Gardener,” Shera said to Kerian.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
